data.title: Binance Introduces New Chat Feature for Enhanced User Interaction
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform has launched Binance Chat, a new feature designed to integrate social interaction with cryptocurrency transfers. This innovative tool aims to create a seamless ecosystem for communication and value exchange among users. The feature allows users to access chatrooms directly from their homepage or Binance Square profile, facilitating real-time market discussions and strategy exchanges in a social-first environment.

Binance Chat offers several interactive social tools to enhance user engagement. Users can share Trade Cards and Red Packets within conversations, promoting a more dynamic interaction. Additionally, the feature supports instant asset and information flow, enabling one-tap crypto transfers that allow information and value to move simultaneously. To get started, users can tap the Chat icon on the homepage or search for Chat in the search bar. They can add friends using Chat ID, UID, or QR code, and join groups by visiting a creator's profile on Binance Square.

The introduction of Binance Chat marks a significant step in integrating communication, trading, and community building within the platform. By making crypto interactions more accessible, Binance aims to simplify the user experience. However, Binance emphasizes that the chat feature is a communication and content-sharing tool and does not constitute financial or investment advice. Users are encouraged to conduct their own research before engaging in trading activities, as Binance is not liable for any losses incurred. The platform reserves the right to monitor and manage content within the chat, ensuring a safe and compliant environment for all users.

data.title: Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesperson: Reports of a ceasefire extension have not been confirmed.
data.description: According to Iranian state media, a spokesperson for the Iranian Foreign Ministry stated that reports of a ceasefire extension have not yet been confirmed, and Pakistan is currently the only country actively participating in the mediation. (Jinshi)

data.title: OpenClaw maintainers respond to negative controversies: upholding neutrality and open source principles, not for profit or market manipulation.
data.description: Onur Solmaz, maintainer of the open-source AI proxy project OpenClaw, has publicly responded strongly to various negative controversies. He stated that the project has been subjected to continuous attacks because OpenClaw adheres to a neutral, public-interest nature, refusing to participate in token price manipulation or pursue commercial profits, thus differentiating itself from profit-driven AI proxy products in the industry. The project maintains industry and geopolitical neutrality, and it is precisely because its development has impacted the interests of its peers that it has been deliberately smeared. The official statement also refutes numerous accusations regarding its bloat, insufficient security, and acquisition by OpenAI, highlighting architectural optimizations, rapid vulnerability fixes, and the team's free open-source maintenance. It defines the project as AI for the people and calls on the community to jointly build an open-source AI ecosystem.

data.title: AI Market Opportunities Persist Amid Global Uncertainty
data.description: Clients continue to focus on opportunities in the artificial intelligence sector, despite ongoing uncertainties surrounding the Iran conflict and its impact on the energy markets, according to Rockefeller president and CEO Greg Fleming. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting Fleming's observations on the resilience of interest in AI investments. The geopolitical tensions and energy market disruptions have not deterred investors from exploring the potential of AI technologies, which are seen as transformative across various industries. Fleming emphasized the importance of staying informed and adaptable in the face of global challenges, as the AI sector offers significant growth prospects. The ongoing situation in Iran and its repercussions on energy supplies remain a concern, but the allure of AI advancements continues to capture the attention of market participants.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Seeks Information from Private Credit Firms Amid Rising Concerns
data.description:
The U.S. Treasury Department has quietly begun requesting detailed information from private credit companies about their business models and connections to the regulated financial system. According to Odaily, this move comes as the private credit sector faces increasing pressure, causing investor unease and raising concerns about systemic risks in the financial industry. The economic turmoil triggered by the Iran conflict is a recent driving factor, but the private credit sector has also been hit hard due to its exposure to the software industry and internal disruptions last fall.

The Treasury's data request marks a new phase in the Trump administration's efforts to understand and mitigate potential damage from volatility in private credit. A Treasury spokesperson stated that the department "regularly consults with market participants and financial regulators on private credit issues." For several months, Treasury officials have been holding one-on-one meetings with leaders in the private credit sector. According to two sources familiar with the process, the Treasury's Office of Capital Markets is now leading the information-gathering effort and has requested written responses.

data.title: Bitdeer released its March operating data: 661 BTC self-mined, AI cloud business ARR reached $43 million.
data.description: Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company Bitdeer released unaudited production and operations updates for March 2026. The data revealed that its self-operated mining output reached 661 Bitcoins in March, a year-on-year increase of approximately 480%. Bitcoin's self-operated hashrate increased to approximately 70 EH/s, a year-on-year increase of approximately 504%. It is understood that seasonal factors in Norway and Bhutan had some impact on output that month, but mining performance is expected to continue to strengthen in the coming months. Furthermore, driven by accelerated demand from AI clients, Bitdeer's AI cloud business achieved annualized recurring revenue (ARR) of approximately $43 million, a month-on-month increase of 105%. (Globenewswire)

data.title: BNB Surpasses 620 USDT with a 0.59% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 15, 2026, 11:50 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 620 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 620.049988 USDT, with a narrowed 0.59% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: STOCKS | Huashengchang Reports Abnormal Stock Price Fluctuation
data.description: On April 15, Jin10 reported that Huashengchang issued a notice regarding abnormal stock price movements. The company experienced a cumulative deviation of 20% in stock closing prices over two consecutive trading days, April 14 and April 15, 2026, indicating unusual fluctuations. According to Jin10, after conducting a self-examination and consulting with the controlling shareholder and actual controller, the company confirmed that there are no undisclosed major matters as of April 15. On February 28, the company announced plans to acquire 100% equity in Galant for an estimated total value of 460 million yuan. Additionally, controlling shareholder Yuan Jianmin intends to transfer 5% of shares to Yu Xinwen. The acquisition is still in the planning stage, and the final plan will be based on the formal agreement. Investors are advised to be cautious of potential risks.

data.title: The Shaoguan branch of the People's Bank of China issued a risk warning about virtual currencies and published four typical cases.
data.description: The Shaoguan Branch of the People's Bank of China, in conjunction with the Shaoguan Municipal Government Office, issued a risk warning regarding virtual currencies and publicized four typical cases: money laundering through "high-paying U-exchange part-time jobs," illegal fundraising through "guaranteed high-interest cryptocurrency trading," pyramid scheme fraud involving the "RWA Digital Cultural Tourism Fund," and offline "cryptocurrency trading" disguised as foreign exchange transactions. The regulatory authorities clarified that virtual currency exchange, trading, and RWA tokenization activities are all illegal financial activities. Projects claiming "high returns, low risk, and guaranteed profits" are mostly scams. The public should abandon get-rich-quick fantasies, stay away from virtual currency-related investments, choose legitimate financial channels, and report any abnormalities to the police promptly to minimize losses.

data.title: The U.S. private lending industry is facing increasing pressure, prompting the Treasury Department to initiate data collection to mitigate risks.
data.description: Multiple sources familiar with the matter revealed that the U.S. Treasury Department has quietly begun requesting private lending companies to submit detailed information about their business models and connections to the regulated financial system. The private lending industry has faced increasing pressure in recent weeks, causing investor unease and exacerbating concerns about systemic risks across the financial sector. The economic turmoil triggered by the Iran war is a recent driving factor, but private lending has also been severely impacted by its exposure to the software industry and internal turmoil last fall. The Treasury Department's data request marks a new phase in the Trump administration's efforts to understand and mitigate the potential damage from private lending volatility. A Treasury spokesperson stated that the department "regularly consults with market participants and financial regulators on private lending issues." It is understood that Treasury personnel have been holding one-on-one meetings with private lending leaders for months. According to two sources familiar with the process, the Treasury's Office of Capital Markets is now leading the information gathering effort and requesting written responses. (Jinshi)

data.title: The United States and Iran continue to exchange information through Pakistan.
data.description: Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman Baghae stated at a press conference today (April 15) that since the Iranian delegation returned to Tehran, Iran has exchanged multiple rounds of information with the United States through Pakistan. Iran's position is very clear, and these positions were not only expressed in previous negotiations but also reiterated in subsequent exchanges. Furthermore, Iran hosted a delegation from Pakistan on April 15. (CCTV International News)

data.title: Iran: Information exchanges with the United States continue
data.description: An Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesman said on the 15th that communication between Iran and the United States through Pakistan continues. (Xinhua)

data.title: KKR acquires approximately $820 million in convertible bonds from Samsung SDS.
data.description: Investment firm KKR announced a definitive agreement with Samsung SDS, a blockchain and IT financial services provider owned by Samsung, to acquire 1.22 trillion won (approximately $820 million) worth of newly issued convertible bonds. Samsung SDS launched its digital transformation experience service in 2020, including a blockchain platform, and is collaborating with Shinhan Bank to develop blockchain-powered certificate services. It also serves as a technical advisor for the Bank of Korea's CBDC pilot project. KKR will reportedly provide consulting services on mergers and acquisitions, capital allocation, artificial intelligence products, and global expansion, as well as accelerating the development of its AI infrastructure. (CNBC)

data.title: Trump Suggests Potential Fed Rate Cut with Waller's Appointment
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has indicated that Federal Reserve interest rates might decrease following the appointment of Christopher Waller. According to ChainCatcher, this statement was reported by Jinshi News. The potential rate cut is seen as a significant move in the current economic climate.

data.title: Trump Threatens to Dismiss Federal Reserve Chair Powell
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has stated that Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell will be dismissed if he does not leave his position on time. According to ChainCatcher, this announcement underscores ongoing tensions between Trump and Powell regarding monetary policy decisions. Trump's comments reflect his dissatisfaction with Powell's handling of interest rates and economic strategies.

data.title: Morgan Stanley's First Quarter Stock Trading Revenue Exceeds Expectations
data.description: Morgan Stanley reported its first-quarter stock trading revenue at $5.15 billion, surpassing market expectations of $4.78 billion. According to Jin10, this performance highlights the bank's strong trading capabilities amid fluctuating market conditions. The higher-than-expected revenue reflects Morgan Stanley's ability to navigate the complexities of the financial markets effectively.

data.title: Binance to Host Toncoin Trading Tournament with $400,000 Prize Pool
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform is set to launch a Toncoin (TON) Trading Tournament, offering eligible users a chance to share a total prize pool of 400,000 USDC in token vouchers. The promotion period is scheduled from 2026-04-15 12:00 (UTC) to 2026-04-29 12:00 (UTC). This tournament is open to all verified new, regular, and VIP users, excluding liquidity providers in the Binance Spot Liquidity Provider Program and Binance Brokers.

**Eligible Trading Pairs and Participation**

The trading pairs eligible for this tournament are TON/USDT and TON/USDC. To participate, users must click the 'Join Now' button on the landing page to register and trade a cumulative amount of at least 500 USD equivalent in any of the eligible pairs on Binance Spot during the promotion period. Users who do not meet this threshold will not qualify for any rewards.

**Reward Structure and Distribution**

The rewards are structured based on cumulative trading volume during the promotion period. The top participant will receive 20,000 USDC, while the second and third places will receive 16,000 USDC and 12,000 USDC, respectively. Participants ranked from 4th to 1,000th place will share varying amounts of the prize pool, with all remaining eligible participants sharing 160,000 USDC, capped at 20 USDC per user. Token vouchers will be distributed by 2026-05-13 and must be redeemed within 21 days.

**Promotion Rules and Conditions**

Trading volume from zero-fee trading pairs is excluded from the final calculation. All eligible buy and sell orders will count towards the cumulative trading volume. Binance reserves the right to disqualify users involved in dishonest behavior or who tamper with the program code. The campaign's commencement is contingent upon the successful listing of the relevant token on Binance Spot.

data.title: U.S. President Donald Trump Addresses Anthropic Issue
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump stated that the issue concerning Anthropic will be resolved. According to Jin10, Trump made this remark while discussing the challenges related to Anthropic. The President did not provide specific details on the measures to be taken but assured that the situation would be addressed effectively.

data.title: US media: US and Iran agree in principle to extend ceasefire
data.description: According to an Associated Press report today (April 15), mediators are close to reaching an agreement on extending the temporary ceasefire between the United States and Iran and pushing for the resumption of negotiations. Sources said both sides have "agreed in principle" to extend the ceasefire agreement, which expires on April 22, to buy more time for diplomacy. The report stated that the US blockade of Iranian ports and threats from Iran have cast uncertainty on the ceasefire's prospects. Currently, all parties are seeking compromises on key differences such as Iran's nuclear program, the Strait of Hormuz, and wartime reparations. (CCTV International News) (Jinshi)
